title: taraxacum jurassicum
intro: Taraxacum jurassicum is a lesser-known species of the dandelion plant family, known scientifically as the Taraxacum genus, but more specifically Taraxacum jurassicum is not a recognized classification of the plant family. However, I can provide information on Taraxacum officinale, which is a well-known species within the same family. Taraxacum officinale, also known as the common dandelion, is a flowering plant with medicinal properties that include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The plant has been used to make herbal preparations such as teas, tinctures, and infusions, which have been traditionally used to aid digestion, lower blood pressure, and support liver health.
